## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new behavior (or N/A for docs/infra)
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `CLAUDE.md`, ADR if non-obvious)
- [ ] No secrets, internal hostnames, or proprietary content introduced
- [ ] Conventional Commit format on the PR title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
